old_value: {"id":"pgsql-4hy","title":"Fail fast on re-entrant client usage inside stream/COPY callbacks","description":"Callbacks passed to RowStream::for_each, Client::copy_out handler, and Client::copy_in writer currently execute while operation_guard is held. If callback code issues another DB operation on the same Client, it can self-deadlock waiting for the same lock. Add a fail-fast re-entrancy guard and tests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:41:42Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:41:42Z"}

{"id":"pgsql-wc7","title":"Treat decoder/protocol ErrorResponse as fatal in wait_for_notification","description":"Client::wait_for_notification currently ignores non-notification backend messages. Decoder hardening can synthesize ErrorResponse for malformed frames; wait loop must raise ServerError immediately instead of continuing.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:41:42Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:41:42Z"}

new_value: Implemented fail-fast re-entrancy guard via ClientUsageError; wrapped stream/COPY callbacks and added regressions (client_wbtest + integration tests).
wait_for_notification now raises ServerError immediately on ErrorResponse; added unit regression test for helper.
